content.problemStatement: You are given two sorted arrays $A$ and $B$ of size $N$ and $M$ respectively. You need to merge these two arrays and keep the final array sorted.
content.inputFormat:
- The first line contains two integers $N$ and $M$ — the size of array $A$ and $B$
- The second line contains all the elements of array $A$
- The third line contains all the elements of array $B$
content.outputFormat: Output the merged array elements on a single line.
